name: Occupational Safety and Health for Electricians

reviews.review_description:
This app has great potential for work place training I really enjoyed going through the safe isolation part and will keep checking in on the development. 
Well done to the developers on reacting to feedback and creating a great concept which is informative but also entertaining.

developer_response.body:
Hi,
We are sorry about the unfortunate experience. It seems like something went wrong during our last revision, this bug had never appeared before. We really appreciate you leaving us a comment about it. The issue with the gloves is already fixed, hope you'll find a time to try it once again.

reviews.review_description: Devs handled the glove glitch and let's say I'm a fan! I've been investigating VR training for about 6 months now. In that time I've run the gamut of various VR experiences and this one is special. It's graphically superior to most I've seen and it has great content. The ONLY thing I would say is missing is a testing atmosphere. The guided training is brilliant but there's no second layer of testing for retention. That being said, devs get my recommendation for top company to reach out to for our EHS needs.
I really want to learn things hands on,and this is the very next best thing. Great start!! Let's see more content and hopefully more course's will start to come through.
I  know that this is just a sample but I really like it. Please keep those coming great work. thank you very much to the developers. Great job 😊🙏
